allow: Bash(go get google.golang.org/grpc@latest && go get google.golang.org/protobuf@latest && go get github.com/spf13/viper@latest && go get github.com/gorilla/mux@latest && go get go.uber.org/zap@latest && go get github.com/prometheus/client_golang@latest && go get github.com/hashicorp/raft@latest && go get github.com/boltdb/bolt@latest && go get github.com/syndtr/goleveldb@latest && go mod tidy)
Bash(which golangci-lint && golangci-lint run ./goblob/... || echo "golangci-lint not installed - install with: go install github.com/golangci/golangci-lint/cmd/golangci-lint@latest")
Bash(which protoc && protoc --version || echo "protoc not found")
Bash(go get github.com/spf13/viper && go mod tidy)
Bash(make lint 2>&1 || echo "Lint not available or failed")
